Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Declaration Relief
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER CYNTHIA NAVIGATO's Hearing On Verified Petition For Declaration Relief.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "verified petition for declaratory relief" is granted.

Order signed.
